ksa_text: Establish and operate the enterprise data governance program, including council structure, policy library, stewardship network, data domain ownership registry, and governance metrics.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collaborate with intelligence analysts/targeting organizations involved in related areas.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Accountability structures are in place so that the appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks.

top_anchors.element_label: Accountability structures are in place so that the appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks.
Collaborate with intelligence analysts/targeting organizations involved in related areas.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-003 (DG, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4279 is insufficient to establish relevance to senior-level analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.428, eu_ai_act=0.423, nist_ai_rmf=0.412) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DG domain KSA DG-T-003 excluded at composite 0.4279, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4279 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4279 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DG (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Senior Data Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DG KSA with composite 0.4279 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-T-003 (DG, composite 0.4279) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4279 with signal across ddat=0.428, eu_ai_act=0.423, nist_ai_rmf=0.412 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DG-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4279, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
